## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to discuss GrowthX brand identity redesign project with Frank Slangen from 35.](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is pivoting from a software-focused brand to emphasizing the human+AI synergy](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Current brand assets are disjointed; need cohesive visual identity reflecting new direction](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Frank to start fresh on brand guidelines, expanding/improving existing work](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Key fixed elements: logo, typography. Other aspects open for reimagining](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

## Topics

### Project Context & History

  - [Initial brand guidelines created by previous agency - logo, basic color palette](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Subsequent work with Ray's agency produced updated logo and some concepts](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Recent work with No Big Deal/No Boring Design yielded further logo refinement](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Current guidelines need significant expansion and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Brand Direction

  - [Moving away from software-centric branding](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [New focus: Showcasing combination of human expertise + AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Drawing inspiration from late 70s/early 80s transition to desktop publishing](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Aiming for modern interpretation, not overt retro aesthetic](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)

### Current Assets & Needs

  - [High-quality office/client footage and photography available](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Need templates for case studies (slides + web)](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Require illustrative style for infographics/statistics](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Iconography needed to communicate platform concepts](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Color system open to reimagining (current CMYK theme not mandatory)](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Deliverables & Scope

  - [Expand current guidelines 1.5-2x in content](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [More applied examples for typography, web, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Develop cohesive visual style across all elements](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Create templates for various use cases (case studies, slides, web)](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

### Tools & Access

  - [Frank to receive access to Notion, Linear, and Slack](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Figma files shared; Frank has viewer access currently](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Frank to begin work on fresh brand guidelines document](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Renato to finalize contract and provide full system access](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Schedule regular check-in meetings](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Renato to start briefs for additional website pages this week](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Explore potential logo refinements after establishing core visual identity](https://fathom.video/share/M3DHXpKz3htsy6WE-Ahs63iBf26n7ENh?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
